blocking violations (1):
  ✖ [test.deleted-required-test] src/checkout — module src/checkout no longer has a test for required behavior "checkout" (covered by checkout.spec.ts::rejects empty cart at baseline) — restore the test or drop "checkout" from the module's requiredBehaviors.
